'''hakata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rng|rng]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rng|rng]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hakata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hækætæth|hækætæth]] || [[word:hækætæj|hækætæj]] || [[word:hækætæsh|hækætæsh]] || [[word:hækætæ|hækætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakakatath|hakakatath]] || [[word:hakakataj|hakakataj]] || [[word:hakakatash|hakakatash]] || [[word:hakakata|hakakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakatath|hakatath]] || [[word:hakataj|hakataj]] || [[word:hakatash|hakatash]] || [[word:hakata|hakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakaftath|hakaftath]] || [[word:hakaftaj|hakaftaj]] || [[word:hakaftash|hakaftash]] || [[word:hakaftaf|hakaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hakatatha|hakatatha]] || [[word:hakataja|hakataja]] || [[word:hakatasha|hakatasha]] || [[word:hakataka|hakataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hakatath|hakatath]] || [[word:hakataj|hakataj]] || [[word:hakatash|hakatash]] || [[word:hakata|hakata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hakatathal|hakatathal]] || [[word:hakatajal|hakatajal]] || [[word:hakatashal|hakatashal]] || [[word:hakatakal|hakatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hakatathatha|hakatathatha]] || [[word:hakatajaja|hakatajaja]] || [[word:hakatashasha|hakatashasha]] || [[word:hakataka|hakataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hakatathan|hakatathan]] || [[word:hakatajan|hakatajan]] || [[word:hakatashan|hakatashan]] || [[word:hakatakan|hakatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hakatathaoro|hakatathaoro]] || [[word:hakatajaoro|hakatajaoro]] || [[word:hakatashaoro|hakatashaoro]] || [[word:hakatakaoro|hakatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
